instruction: Runtime settings (providers, permissions, tools, plugins) go in `opencode.json`. Behavioral guidance (workflow rules, constraints, conventions) goes in `AGENTS.md`. Never mix them.
original_snippets: runtime settings → `opencode.json`; workflow rules, constraints, conventions → `AGENTS.md`

instruction: Project-specific settings go in project-root `opencode.json`. Reserve global config (`~/.config/opencode/opencode.json`) for cross-project defaults only.
original_snippets: global config bleeds into unrelated projects
relevant_when: when deciding where to place config

instruction: Always validate config with `jq . opencode.json` and run `opencode run 'test'` after changes.
NEVER put API keys directly in opencode.json. Use `baseEnv` to reference environment variable names.
original_snippets: NEVER put API key values in opencode.json
